content:
Awọn ilana Hargrove-Mendelssohn fun isopọ anticoagulation perioperative ti o mẹnuba iwọn didun spectral washout (spectral washout volume) ti o kere ju 0.8 ṣaaju idena neuraxial jẹ awọn itọkasi ti a ṣe ni akọkọ fun awọn aṣoju ti o ni ipa lori warfarin ati awọn anticoagulants ti o ni ibatan si vitamin K antagonists. 

Apixaban jẹ apakan ti kilasi awọn DOACs (Direct Oral Anticoagulants), ti o ni awọn ilana idena perioperative ti o yatọ si warfarin nitori ọna iṣẹ ati idaji-aye wọn. Awọn ilana lọwọlọwọ fun apixaban ko lo iwọn didun spectral washout bi itọkasi fun ipinnu akoko idena neuraxial. Dipo, awọn ilana bii ti American Society of Regional An
